name: B & F Finance
description_short: B&F Finance offers signature loans up to $3,000 with fast funding in 30 minutes or less. A locally owned Oklahoma lender operating for over 50 years with a first-loan interest-free promotion.
description_long:
B&F Finance is a locally owned and operated personal loan lender based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, with over 50 years of operating history serving the Oklahoma community. The company specializes in signature loans—unsecured personal loans that do not require collateral—with maximum loan amounts up to $3,000, positioned as a quick-funding alternative for consumers needing cash.

The company's core offering centers on signature loans marketed with emphasis on speed (funding within 30 minutes or less), accessibility, and customer service. They advertise a first-loan interest-free promotion (details available upon inquiry) and highlight low monthly payments as a key feature. Loan applications can be completed online, by phone at (405) 521-0054, or in person at their physical office during business hours. They accept online payments with a $4.99 convenience fee processed through a third-party payment processor (REPAY).

B&F Finance differentiates itself through several customer-focused perks: on-site notary services, a $50 referral reward program, monthly drawings, and an explicit philosophy that applicants are "more than just a number" and "more than your credit score." The company claims to consider multiple factors beyond credit scores in lending decisions. Their positioning emphasizes personal, friendly service and willingness to work with customers who may have credit challenges.

The company operates transparently regarding its service model and online payment mechanics. However, the website provides minimal detail on actual interest rates, APR ranges, loan terms, repayment periods, or underwriting criteria. The first-loan interest-free offer requires contacting the company for details, and no information is disclosed about typical approval rates, income requirements, or what factors beyond credit score are actually considered. As a small-loan provider with a $3,000 maximum, B&F Finance serves a narrow segment of the personal loan market.
address: 2303 N Broadway Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73103

company_info.headquarters: 2303 N Broadway Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73103

pros: First loan interest-free promotion (details available upon inquiry)
Fast funding in 30 minutes or less according to website
50+ years operating history as a locally owned Oklahoma business
Accepts online payments for convenience and account management
On-site notary services available for customers
States they evaluate applicants beyond credit score alone
cons: Maximum loan amount of only $3,000 limits usefulness for larger financial needs
Website lacks transparency on interest rates, APR, and loan terms
No information provided on typical approval rates or underwriting criteria
Online payment processing includes $4.99 convenience fee
Limited geographic footprint (Oklahoma only, single location mentioned)
best_for: Oklahoma residents needing quick access to small loans ($1,000-$3,000)
Borrowers with fair or challenged credit seeking alternatives to traditional banks
Consumers who value personal, local service over online-only lenders
diagnosis: B&F Finance is best for Oklahoma residents needing quick access to small signature loans ($1,000-$3,000) with local, personalized service rather than algorithmic online lending. The main caveat is that the website provides no details on actual interest rates, APR, repayment terms, or underwriting criteria—all critical information must be obtained directly from the company, and the small maximum loan amount limits applicability for most borrowers with substantial financing needs.
services: In-person loan applications at physical office
Fast funding (30 minutes or less claimed)
